name: Model Number
description: The identifier used to specify what group an appliance belongs to. Unused bytes should be set to 0x00.
comment: High confidence: Model Number - 32-byte plain ASCII string, null-padded. Ignore trailing '_' padding.

name: Serial Number
description: The unique identifier used to individualize an appliance within a group. Unused bytes should be set to 0x00.
comment: High confidence: Serial Number - 32-byte plain ASCII string, null-padded. Ignore trailing '_' padding.

name: Control User Interface Locked
description: Specifies whether the user interface for the appliance is currently locked, preventing interaction.
comment: Control User Interface Locked: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Clock Time
description: The current time of the appliance, as displayed on the user interface. Note that this is considered to be the local time of the user.
comment: Clock Time: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Clock Format
description: The current format used for displaying time to the user.
comment: Clock Format: Enum writable select.

name: Temperature Display Units
description: The current units used for displaying temperature to the user.
comment: Temperature Display Units: Temperature display preference setting (select).

name: Appliance Type
description: A unique identifier used to specify the type of the appliance. Only 1 Board within the appliance should respond to the Appliance Type ERD. The board that responds must be the main board that hosts the Public ERDs.
comment: High confidence: Appliance Type enum (u8). Value 35=Zoneline/Vertical. See data[].values for full mapping.

name: Sabbath Mode
description: Specifies whether Sabbath is being observed.
comment: Sabbath Mode: Sabbath mode toggle.

name: Sound Level
description: The current level of which sounds are played to the user.
comment: Sound Level: Enum writable select.

name: Line Input Voltage
description: The Line Input voltage in hundredths
comment: Line Input Voltage: Voltage sensor.

name: Ready to Enter Boot Loader
description: Indicates whether an appliance is ready to enter boot loader mode.

data.name: Ready to enter boot loader state

values.2: Not ready to enter boot loader

comment: High confidence: Ready To Enter Bootloader state. YAML uses payload_on='3', payload_off='2'.

name: Reset Board
description: When this ERD changes, the board will reset after the number of seconds specified in the data. After reset the value of this ERD is 255 to enable ERD change detection therefore 255 as a reset value is unsupported.
comment: Reset Board: Reset/restart button.

name: System Current
description: The current draw of the system.
comment: System Current: Current sensor.

name: Personality (32-bit)
description:
This value should summarize the "personality" for all of the boards in an appliance. The value of
the personality does not necessarily need to have a specific meaning, but must be different for
each meaningfully different configuration. For example, if different models require different
parametric images, the personality for all configurations with different parametric images must
have distinct personality values so that the personality could be used to identify and deliver an
appropriate update package. If there is any confusion about how this value should be assigned you
should work with your service team to help define your personalities.
comment: Personality (32-bit): Single numeric read-only sensor representing the appliance personality identifier.

name: Service Mode State Request
description: Request that an appliance change its service mode state.
comment: Service Mode State Request: Enum writable select.

name: Service Mode State
description: Current service mode state for an appliance.
comment: Service Mode State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Supported Image Types
description: Specifies the supported image types for a board.
comment: Supported Image Types: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Boot Loader Version
description: Specifies the boot loader version for a board. Valid only if the boot loader image type is supported. See 0x0038.
comment: Boot Loader Version: Version information sensor.

name: Application Version
description: Specifies the application version for a board. Valid only if the application image type is supported. See 0x0038.
comment: High confidence: Software Application Version - 4-byte: critical_major.critical_minor.noncritical_major.noncritical_minor. Each byte decoded from hex pair.

name: Parametric Version
description: Specifies the parametric version for a board. Valid only if the parametric image type is supported. See 0x0038.
comment: High confidence: Software Parametric Version - 4-byte: critical_major.critical_minor.noncritical_major.noncritical_minor.

name: Auxiliary Version
description: Specifies the auxiliary version for a board. Valid only if the auxiliary image type is supported. See 0x0038.
comment: High confidence: Software Auxiliary Version - 4-byte: critical_major.critical_minor.noncritical_major.noncritical_minor.

name: Enhanced Sabbath Mode Status
description: Specifies whether Enhanced Sabbath Mode is active.
comment: Enhanced Sabbath Mode Status: Sabbath mode toggle.

name: Timer
description: The number of minutes remaining for the timer on the user interface.
comment: Timer: Timer/duration value.

name: Available Sound Levels
description: List of available sound levels that the unit supports
comment: Available Sound Levels: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Configuration Hash
description: SHA-256 hash for a configuration data JSON document
comment: Configuration Hash: Raw data sensor, interpretation unclear.

name: Brand ID
description: A unique identifier used to specify the Brand of the appliance.

values.1: GEA - Covers all GEA Brands (GE, Profile, Cafe, Monogram, Hotpoint)

comment: Brand ID: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Matter Product ID
description: The Matter Product ID assigned by the CSA (Connectivity Standards Alliance)
comment: Matter Product ID: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Hosted Firmware Status
description: The state of software update that the appliance is in.
comment: Hosted Firmware Status: Enum writable select.

name: Camera Configuration Personality
description:
A personality number that corresponds to a list of camera parameters that are used to optimize the camera stream for the specific characteristics of the appliance unit.
The personalities are defined here: https://github.com/geappliances/android.appliance-camera-parametric.
comment: Camera Configuration Personality: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Alexa Registration Request
description: Used to request a device register with the Alexa Cloud
comment: Alexa Registration Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Alexa Status
description: Status of the embedded Alexa voice module
comment: Alexa Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Matter Device Identify Type
description: The type of action the Matter device takes to identify itself.
comment: Matter Device Identify Type: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Matter Device Identify Time Actual
description: The amount of time remaining (in seconds) that the device is in identify mode.
comment: Matter Device Identify Time Actual: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Matter Device Identify Mode Request
description: Request for device to enter/exit identify mode.
comment: Matter Device Identify Mode Request: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Matter Device On-Off Request
description: Turn on or turn off the front panel/display of a Matter device.
comment: Matter Device On-Off Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Matter Device On-Off State
description: The on-off status of a Matter device.
comment: Matter Device On-Off State: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Matter Device Temperature Display Mode Request
description: Request Matter device to change the temperature display units (Celsius or Fahrenheit).
comment: Matter Device Temperature Display Mode Request: Temperature display preference setting (select).

name: Matter Device Temperature Display Mode Actual
description: Temperature display units (Celsius or Fahrenheit) of a Matter device.
comment: Matter Device Temperature Display Mode Actual: Temperature display preference setting (read-only).

name: Matter Device Keypad Lockout
description: Keypad lockout level of a Matter device.
comment: Matter Device Keypad Lockout: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Matter Device Onboarding Pairing Code
description: The pairing code used in the Matter device commissioning process.
comment: Matter Device Onboarding Pairing Code: String data sensor.

name: Matter Commissioning Mode Request
description: This is the request to open or close the Matter commissioning window
comment: Matter Commissioning Mode Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Matter Commissioning Window State
description: This is the current state of the Matter commissioning window
comment: Matter Commissioning Window State: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Matter Fabric Count
description: This is the number of Fabrics that the Matter device is commissioned to

data.name: The number of Matter Fabrics that the device is commissioned to

comment: Matter Fabric Count: Counter/count sensor.

name: Video Stream
description: This ERD initiates or stops video streaming at a given resolution. Selecting a resolution above capability will result in the highest available resolution.
comment: Video Stream: Enum writable select.

name: Still Frame
description: This ERD initiates a jpeg image capture. Resolution needs to match those available in ERD 0x0500
comment: Still Frame: Multi-field enum, may need custom handling.

name: Camera Stream Authentication Status
description: This ERD indicates the camera stream authentication status.
comment: Camera Stream Authentication Status: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Camera Stream Termination Reason
description: This ERD records the camera stream termination reason for a previously terminated stream. It should be cleared to 00 when a new stream is initiated.
comment: Camera Stream Termination Reason: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Image Upload Inference ID
description:
PictureId is a UUID v4 generated cloud side for each unique picture uploaded.
InferenceId is UUID v4 generated cloud side for each unique inference performed on a picture.
Data is written to the appliance as a single 32 byte ERD to indicate to the firmware that an inference is complete.  The firmware would then be responsible for calling an HTTP endpoint to access the JSON payload for the picture and inference to get the full results.

Link to usage: https://geappliances.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/SHSCT/pages/3248423054/Appliance+Vision+AI#ERD-Structure'
comment: Image Upload Inference ID: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Image Capture Currently Available
description: This ERD is used for appliances to identify to clients that support cameras if the system is in a state that is currently acceptable for capturing images. This could be related to anything pertinent to this particular appliance state, some examples are: Is the Oven light ON in the Oven cavity? Is the door open and the camera is mounted on the door? For the latter example, a system may indicate that streaming is available but privacy filtering should be applied to the image capture with 02
comment: Image Capture Currently Available: Current sensor.

name: Supported Enhanced Features
description: This ERD is used for Core-Enhanced-Cloud (CEC) feature deployment. It provides a list of enhanced features currently supported by the appliance firmware.
comment: Supported Enhanced Features: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Request Enabled Enhanced Features
description: This ERD is used for requesting Core-Enhanced-Cloud (CEC) feature deployment. It allows request for enabling and disabling the features supported by the firmware. This ERD represents request to enable/disable of a digital feature by referring to the slots of supported features in 0x0600
comment: Request Enabled Enhanced Features: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Current Enabled Enhanced Features
description: This ERD is used to enable Core-Enhanced-Cloud (CEC) feature deployment. It allows enabling and disabling the features supported by the firmware. This ERD represents enable/disable of a digital feature by referring to the slots of supported feature in 0x0600

data.name: Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 1 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 2 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 3 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 4 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 5 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 6 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 7 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 8 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 9 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 10 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 11 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 12 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 13 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 14 Enabled
Current Enabled Digital Features.Digital Feature 15 Enabled

comment: Current Enabled Enhanced Features: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Reset Count
description: The number of times a reset has occurred.
comment: High confidence: Reset Count - raw unsigned integer. Increments on each board reset.

name: Reset Reason
description: The reason for the last reset.
comment: High confidence: Reset Reason enum (u8). Values: 0=Software, 1=Watchdog, 2=Power On, 3=Unknown. See data[].values.

name: Seconds Since Last Reset
description: The number of seconds since a reset last occurred.
comment: Seconds Since Last Reset: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Program Counter of Last Failed Assertion
description: The program counter at the time that the last failed assertion was made.

data.name: Program Counter of Last Failed Assertion

comment: Medium confidence: Uassert Address - raw hex value for firmware debugging.

name: Linux Diagnostics - Memory Usage
description: RAM and swap usage
comment: Linux Diagnostics - Memory Usage: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Linux Diagnostics - Load Averages
description: Load averages for the past 1, 5, and 15 minutes.
comment: Linux Diagnostics - Load Averages: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Linux Diagnostics - Uptime
description: Time since last boot.
comment: Linux Diagnostics - Uptime: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Linux Diagnostics - Disk Usage
description: Disk usage by partition.
comment: Linux Diagnostics - Disk Usage: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: Low level statistics for a GEA2/3 interface.

data.name: Bytes Received That Were Not Part Of A Packet
Packets Not Sent Because Retries Exhausted
Packets Not Sent Because Payload Was Too Large
Packets Not Sent Because Queue Was Full

Packets Not Sent Because Retries Exhausted

Packets Not Sent Because Queue Was Full

description: Low level statistics for a GEA2/3 interface.

Packets Not Sent Because Retries Exhausted
Packets Not Sent Because Payload Was Too Large
Packets Not Sent Because Queue Was Full

comment: GEA2/3 Interface Diagnostics (Interface 6): Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Non-Volatile Usage Warning or Error Details
description: Information on which non-volatile ERD was written to more times than the system-defined warning or error threshold.

data.name: Estimated ERD writes per year (extrapolated from writes during period)
Estimated ERD writes per year (from the configuration)

comment: Non-Volatile Usage Warning or Error Details: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Non-Volatile Usage Warning Threshold Exceeded
description: Flag indicating that a non-volatile ERD has been written to more times than the system-defined warning threshold.
comment: Non-Volatile Usage Warning Threshold Exceeded: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Non-Volatile Usage Error Threshold Exceeded
description: Flag indicating that a non-volatile ERD has been written to more times than the system-defined error threshold.
comment: Non-Volatile Usage Error Threshold Exceeded: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Current Sound Theme
description: Specifies the current sound theme being used.
comment: Current Sound Theme: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Sound Theme Request
description: Request to change the current sound theme.
comment: Sound Theme Request: Enum writable select.

name: Supported Sound Themes
description: Specifies all the supported sound themes in the appliance.
comment: Supported Sound Themes: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Sign of Life
description:
Periodically changing value that should be written to the device to prove that the client is communicative. The client can
listen for publications of this ERD to determine whether the device is communicative. This can be written open loop because
the value written has no meaning except that it should change periodically.
comment: Sign of Life: Heartbeat/keep-alive sensor.

name: UI Sound Level Request
description: Used to request the desired sound level from the UI.
comment: UI Sound Level Request: Single numeric writable value.

name: UI Sound Level State
description: The current sound level setting.
comment: UI Sound Level State: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Number of Sound Level Settings
description: Maximum sound level setting
comment: Number of Sound Level Settings: Single numeric writable value.

name: Battery Level
description: Current battery level as a percentage of full charge.
comment: Battery Level: Battery level sensor.

name: Battery Is Charging
description: Current battery charge state. True if charging, false if not charging.
comment: Battery Is Charging: Battery charging binary sensor.

name: Appliance Is Plugged Into Wall
description: Specifies whether an appliance is plugged into a wall outlet. Relevant for battery-powered appliances.
comment: Appliance Is Plugged Into Wall: Plugged-in status binary sensor.

name: Battery Temperature
description: Current battery temperature in degrees Fahrenheit.
comment: Battery Temperature: Temperature in Fahrenheit.

name: Battery Health
description: Current battery health (capacity) as a percentage of original capacity.
comment: Battery Health: Battery level sensor.

name: Display Temperature
description:
The actual temperature of the unit fresh food and freezer compartment.
ERD should not be used when both data values are set to 127.
comment: Display Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Desired Temperature
description:
Used to read or write the desired fresh food and freezer setpoint temperature for the unit.
Legacy ERD that it does not follow Request/Status ERDs' architecture.
Both values should be written according to limits defined in ERD 0x100B;
except for special case to turn off the cooling system in the unit.
Only Wine Chiller and Beverage Center (appliance types 24 and 25) support this ERD 
to turn cooling off by writing 100 to both values.
Cooling is turned back on by writing any other setpoint within limits such as
default values: 37 for fresh food and 0 for freezer.
comment: Desired Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Door Alarm Alert
description: Specifies which door alarms are active on the appliance.
comment: Door Alarm Alert: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Ice Maker Bucket Status
description:
Used to read the fresh food and freezer ice maker presence and bucket full information.
Ice maker present bits (0 or 1) should be checked before reading bucket full bits (2 and 3).
Bucket full status should be ignored when ice maker is reported not present. 
ERD 0x100A should be updated taking into consideration the presence data from this ERD.

data.name: Fresh Food Ice Maker Bucket Full

comment: Ice Maker Bucket Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Water Filter Status
description: The state of the water filter.

values.0: Filter Does Not Need To Be Ordered

comment: Water Filter Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Ice Maker Control
description:
Used to read or write the desired fresh food and freezer ice maker state.
Legacy ERD that it does not follow Request/Status ERDs' architecture.
Both values should be written in ERD. 
ERD should not be used when both values are set to 255 (Not Applicable);
but it is acceptable to just have a single ice maker in the unit. 
If one of the ice maker data is set to 255; then value should be maintained 
while updating the other ice maker.
comment: Ice Maker Control: Multi-field enum, may need custom handling.

name: Temperature Limits
description: The minimum and maximum values for the desired temperature.
comment: Temperature Limits: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Humidity Control
description:
Used to read or write the current mode for humidity mitigation.
Legacy ERD that it does not follow Request/Status ERDs' architecture.
ERD should not be used when data is 255 (Not equipped).
comment: Humidity Control: Humidity percentage sensor.

name: Quick Ice Status
description:
Used to read or write the quick ice feature status.
Legacy ERD that it does not follow Request/Status ERDs' architecture.
ERD should not be used when data is 255 (Not equipped).
comment: Quick Ice Status: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Turbo Freeze Status
description:
Used to read or write the turbo freeze feature status.
Legacy ERD that it does not follow Request/Status ERDs' architecture.
ERD should not be used when data is 255 (Not equipped).
comment: Turbo Freeze Status: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Turbo Cool Status
description:
Used to read or write the turbo cool feature status.
Legacy ERD that it does not follow Request/Status ERDs' architecture.
ERD should not be used when data is 255 (Not equipped).
comment: Turbo Cool Status: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Hot Water Status
description:
Used to read the state of the hot water dispenser.
ERD should not be used when status data is 255 (Not Applicable).

values.0: Not Present (Hot Water and K-cup capable type)
values.1: Present (Hot Water and K-cup capable type)

comment: Hot Water Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Hot Water Desired Temperature
description:
Used to read or write the desired temperature of the hot water.
Legacy ERD that it does not follow Request/Status ERDs' architecture.
ERD 0x1018 should be read before writing this ERD.
Temperature should only be written when ERD 0x1018 status is 0 (Available).
ERD should not be used when ERD 0x1010 status is 255 (Not Applicable).
comment: Hot Water Desired Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Deli Pan Selection
description: The selected position of the deli pan.
comment: Deli Pan Selection: Enum writable select.

name: Deli Pan Desired Temperature
description: The desired temperature of the deli pan. Please note that values greater than or equal to 99 degrees Fahrenheit are not allowed.
comment: Deli Pan Desired Temperature: Temperature in Fahrenheit.

name: Door Status
description: The state of the door.
comment: Door Status: Door status sensor with multiple fields.

name: Altitude Status
description:
Used to read or write the high altitude setting status.
Legacy ERD that it does not follow Request/Status ERDs' architecture.
comment: Altitude Status: Enum writable select.

name: Hot Water Local Use
description:
Used to read the usage status of hot water.
ERD 0x1011 should not be written when status is different than 0 (Available).
comment: Hot Water Local Use: Enum writable select.

name: Water Filter Type
description: The type of water filter in this unit.
comment: Water Filter Type: Enum read-only sensor.
